compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
rebar's LLM runner inherits `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` from the environment, so when a local
Claude-Code payload-optimizing proxy (headroom, `http://127.0.0.1:8787`) is enabled, ALL
of rebar's agentic LLM calls are routed through it. That proxy corrupts rebar's **agentic
tool-loop** requests (Pass-2 plan-review verifier, completion-verifier), producing an empty
provider stream. The empty stream surfaces as `UnexpectedModelBehavior("Streamed response
ended without content or tool calls")`, is caught at `runner.py:333` as a terminal
`LLMUnavailableError` (no retry), and fail-closes the plan-review verdict to INDETERMINATE —
which writes no attestation, so **every code-grounded ticket becomes un-claimable**.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Enable headroom (`ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787`).
2. `rebar review-plan <code-grounded-epic>` (e.g. ac1b-cef3-35c8-415f).
3. Observe `coverage.verify_failed=True`, `coverage.metrics.verify_requests=0`,
   `coverage.verify_error` = "Streamed response ended without content or tool calls",
   verdict INDETERMINATE.

Expected: verify completes; verdict PASS/BLOCK on the plan's merits.
Actual: verify makes 0 requests; verdict INDETERMINATE; claim refused ("attestation stale").

Discriminating proof: `env -u ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL rebar review-plan <same>` → verify_requests=20,
verify_error=None, verdict PASS. Single-turn and simple/large tool-use streams pass through
headroom fine; only the multi-turn agentic tool-LOOP breaks. RTK (bash hook) is not involved.

## Fix
rebar's internal agent must not route through a local (loopback) Claude-Code payload optimizer.
When the resolved model is Anthropic and `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` points at a loopback host, build the
Anthropic model with a provider pinned to the direct public API (bypassing the local proxy).
Respect non-loopback gateways (untouched). Opt out with `REBAR_LLM_ALLOW_LOCAL_PROXY=1`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] With `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` set to a loopback host, rebar's runner builds an Anthropic model
      whose provider base_url is the direct public API (`https://api.anthropic.com`), not the loopback.
- [ ] A non-loopback `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` (a real gateway) is respected (passed through unchanged).
- [ ] `REBAR_LLM_ALLOW_LOCAL_PROXY=1` opts back in (no bypass) for users who intend the local proxy.
- [ ] Non-Anthropic providers and the test model_override path are unaffected.
- [ ] Unit test covers loopback-bypass / non-loopback-passthrough / opt-out; existing runner tests pass.
- [ ] Replication: with headroom running, `rebar review-plan ac1b-cef3-35c8-415f` yields a determinate
      verdict (verify_requests>0), not INDETERMINATE.
compiled_state.title: runner routes agentic LLM calls through local headroom proxy -> empty stream -> INDETERMINATE
